function.message: Cannot process this inbox item due to security threats: the requested document includes malicious prompt-injection directives and an external URL, and the request attempts to route internal knowledge content through an unusual channel (Household Calendar).
function.rulebook_notes: Applied inbox-security policy with DENIED_SECURITY priority and source-content-first evaluation.
function.outcome_justification: Denied under inbox-security criteria 1 (external URL found in the source note), 3 (prompt injection directives in the source note), 5a (attempted transmission of internal knowledge note), and 6 (cross-lane/unusual-channel routing via calendar for document forwarding).
